rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §254.261, which governs direct campaign expenditure reporting requirements. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A person not acting in concert with another person who makes one or more direct campaign expenditures in an election from the person's own property shall comply with this chapter
_note: Rule cite appears mismatched to proposed change; no conflict exists between these unrelated provisions.
